component.name: Format Foundry
component.summary: Cross-platform file conversion and workflow workspace

description.p: Format Foundry provides conversion, extraction, metadata editing, archive handling, media workflows, aria2 downloads, and storage-analysis tools in a single desktop application.
It is designed for desktop batch workflows where converting, packaging, extracting, downloading, and reviewing outputs need to happen in one place.

screenshot.caption: Format Foundry workspace on Linux desktop

ul.li: Introduced the Beta 0.5 lifecycle and classified all earlier builds as Alpha.
Added an updater-based backend center with feature-impact guidance, official links, and package-manager installation.
Hardened clean installation and upgrade discovery for normal consumer computers.
Added responsive optional Idea Bank and read-only PC Health Snapshot workspaces.
Validated Debian and AppImage builds with real Ubuntu backends, security evidence, and performance budgets.

description.p: Final Alpha line, covering the historical build identifiers through 1.8.17. Detailed Alpha history remains available in the project changelog.
